achievements.title: Town of Ayles
achievements.description: Complete all 4 sub-quests in the Town of Ayles.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Getting Work
achievements.description: Complete all 3 sub-quests of the Guild in Adonis.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Delicious Meal
achievements.description: Complete 3 sub-quests in Adonis: 2x Chef Medium, and Juno.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Adonis
achievements.description: Complete 3 sub-quests in Adonis: Philia, Rina, and Hotdog.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: In the Shadows
achievements.description: Complete 3 sub-quests in East Adonis and Adonis: 2x Dragon Warrior and Dark Merchant.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Hungry Diana
achievements.description: Complete 2 sub-quests in Adonis and Town of Hades: Dennis and Diana.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Seal of Deceit
achievements.description: Slay Pale in the Cave of Deceit without Origin of Life usage or instant continue.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Interception
achievements.description: Slay Choi and steal the letter in the Hades Snowfield bridge.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Hidden Chest
achievements.description: Solve the puzzle and open the chest in the Valley of Despise - Chaos Valley.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Seal of Despise (Good)
achievements.description: Slay Vicious in the Valley of Despise without Origin of Life usage or instant continue - Good path.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Seal of Despise (Evil)
achievements.description: Slay Vague in the Valley of Despise without Origin of Life usage or instant continue - Evil path.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: What is this guy's problem?
achievements.description: Complete both of Ian's sub-quests in the City of Hades.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Town of Hades
achievements.description: Complete 3 sub-quests in the Town of Hades: Chief of Hades, Absinthe, and Hades Chef.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Pa pa pa pow!
achievements.description: Complete the Dark Merchant's sub-quest in the Town of Hades.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Seal of Greed
achievements.description: Destroy the seal of greed in Lamis Woods.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Chronos
achievements.description: Complete all 6 sub-quests in Chronos: Jin, Wood Chef, Rick, Jade, Harley, and Adelia.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Boo!
achievements.description: Complete 5 sub-quests in Libra Oasis: Pandora, 2x Ghost and 2x Libra Chief.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Libra Oasis
achievements.description: Complete 3 sub-quests in Libra Oasis: Sasha, Choopa and Guild Worker.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: The Lighting Hunter
achievements.description: Complete 3 sub-quests in Libra Oasis: 2x Lyer, and Tru.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Book of Magic
achievements.description: Complete the second Pandora's sub-quest in Libra Oasis.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Seal of Betrayal
achievements.description: Slay the Ghost of Ladon in Shrine of Betrayal without Origin of Life usage or instant continue.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Leo
achievements.description: Complete 3 sub-quests in Leo: 2x Royal Chef, and Ralph.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Animal Lover
achievements.description: Complete the 2 sub-quests in Leon and Adonis: Colddog, and Hotdog.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Seal of Shame (Good)
achievements.description: Slay Vilurent in the Temple Basement without Origin of Life usage or instant continue - Good path.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Seal of Shame (Evil)
achievements.description: Slay Lady Charity in Temple Basement without Origin of Life usage or instant continue - Evil path.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: The Source of all Evil
achievements.description: Slay Osiris in the Canyon of Despair without Origin of Life usage or instant continue.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Elements of Earth
achievements.description: Finish the game as Paladin.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Strength and Courage
achievements.description: Finish the game as Warrior.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Silent as a Shadow
achievements.description: Finish the game as Assassin.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Langue
achievements.description: Finish the game on the good path.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Parole
achievements.description: Finish the game on the evil path.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Magic Item
achievements.description: Drop any blue equipment or ornament.

achievements.title: Rare Item
achievements.description: Drop any golden equipment or ornament.

achievements.title: Epic Item
achievements.description: Drop any purple equipment or ornament.

achievements.title: Blue Set
achievements.description: Equip all 5 equipments with any blue item.

achievements.title: Golden Knight
achievements.description: Equip all 5 equipments with any golden item.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Reforged
achievements.description: Outside the blacksmith's room, fix an equipped item using the hammer.

achievements.title: Novice
achievements.description: Raise the level to 10.
achievements.author: Universus

achievements.title: Knight
achievements.description: Raise the level to 25.

achievements.title: Commander

achievements.title: Strong like my father
achievements.description: Raise the level to 75.
